creator: dfr@rabson.org
text: Would it make sense to add a variant of the sysutils/rpi-firmware port which can be pinned to the last version before the devices were re-ordered upstream (1.20210805, I think)? This would allow FreeBSD versions without the fix (12.4, 13.1 and 13.2) to use compatible firmware while also allowing more recent firmware for 13-stable and 14.
